title: Intake Agent Output
description: Structured output generated by the AI intake agent at the end of the diagnostic conversation. This feeds into the Document Analysis Engine and Report Generator.

engagement_id.description: Unique engagement identifier from the session link

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the intake was completed

name.description: Company name as stated by the client

industry.description: General industry description in the client's own words

headcount.description: Total number of employees. Null if not disclosed.

revenue_range.description: Annual revenue range as stated by client. Include currency. E.g., '10-50M RMB', 'under 5M USD'

years_operating.description: Years the company has been in business

client_name.description: Name of the person who completed the intake

name.description: Department name as the client called it

headcount.description: Number of people in this department

key_responsibilities.description: Brief summary of what this department does

pain_points.description: Operational pain points identified during the conversation. Ordered by severity/impact as assessed by the agent.

description.description: Clear description of the pain point

process_involved.description: The specific process or workflow that's broken (e.g., 'quotation preparation', 'order data entry')

time_per_occurrence_minutes.description: Estimated minutes spent each time this occurs

estimated_hours_per_week.description: Total team hours per week spent on this pain point

estimated_people_involved.description: Number of people affected or involved

impact.description: Business impact described by the client (e.g., 'lost orders', 'delayed payments', 'customer complaints')

client_quote.description: A direct quote from the client describing this pain point, if memorable

current_tools.description: All tools and systems mentioned by the client

name.description: Tool or system name (e.g., 'Kingdee K/3', 'Excel', 'WeChat', 'paper forms')

adoption_level.description: How much the tool is actually used vs. available

pain_associated.description: Any frustration the client expressed about this tool

documents_uploaded.description: Documents the client uploaded during the conversation

filename.description: Original filename of the uploaded document

detected_type.description: Document type as classified by the agent

description.description: Brief description of what the agent observed in the document

key_quotes.description: Notable direct quotes from the client that reveal operational reality. These are used in the findings report.

recommended_focus_areas.description: Agent's assessment of which areas to prioritize in the analysis, based on the conversation

area.description: Focus area name (e.g., 'Order Processing Automation', 'AR Collection Workflow')

rationale.description: Why this area should be prioritized — based on time waste, frequency, or business impact

estimated_weekly_hours_recoverable.description: Rough estimate of hours per week that could be recovered

duration_minutes.description: Estimated duration of the conversation in minutes

client_engagement_level.description: How engaged the client was during the conversation

follow_up_needed.description: List of information still needed that the client couldn't provide
